# CWE-501 positive: trusted approval merged with client JSON (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-501-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"encoding/json"
	"net/http"
)

type payoutEnvelope struct {
	Approved bool    `json:"approved"`
	Amount   float64 `json:"amount"`
	Memo     string  `json:"memo"`
}

func QueuePayout(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	var msg payoutEnvelope
	if err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&msg); err != nil {
		http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusBadRequest)
		return
	}
	msg.Approved = true
	_ = json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(msg)
}
